page_content:
JWST648 Readings in Jewish History (3 Credits)

Focus on the central issues in Jewish history as well as the key historiographical debates on those issues.

Repeatable to: 9 credits if content differs.

JWST658 Readings in Jewish Thought and Culture (3 Credits) Examines key issues in the development of Jewish thought and culture. Repeatable to: 9 credits if content differs.
